norm_1.content: Everyone is not allowed to make loud phone calls in the cafe.
norm_1.subject: everyone
norm_1.object: to make loud phone calls in the cafe

norm_2.content: Customers are not allowed to occupy tables for extended periods without ordering.
norm_2.subject: customers
norm_2.object: to occupy tables for extended periods without ordering

norm_3.content: Patrons are not allowed to eat or drink near the entrance area.
norm_3.subject: patrons
norm_3.object: to eat or drink near the entrance area

norm_4.content: All patrons must pay for their orders before leaving the cafe.
norm_4.subject: all patrons
norm_4.object: for their orders before leaving the cafe

norm_5.content: Most people keep noise levels low during peak hours.
norm_5.subject: most people
norm_5.object: noise levels low during peak hours
